headlines.description: — Jack Jones had a fitting celebration after his overtime interception in the first NFL regular-season game in Spain.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jones celebrates in Cristiano Ronaldo style as Dolphins beat Commanders 16-13 in overtime in Spain

headlines.description: — Bryce Young fought off the criticism that accompanied his modest 124 yards passing in an ugly loss to New Orleans last week.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bryce Young passes for franchise-record 448 yards to lift Panthers to 30-27 win over Falcons in OT

events.name: Tampa Bay Buccaneers at Buffalo Bills

headlines.description: — Josh Allen wasn't in an I-told-you-so mood after he threw three touchdown passes and ran for three scores.
headlines.shortLinkText: Josh Allen has 3 TDs passing, 3 rushing to outduel Baker Mayfield as Bills beat Buccaneers 44-32

headlines.description: — The Houston Texans keep digging early holes for themselves. With Davis Mills filling in while C.J. Stroud is in the concussion protocol, they've put together back-to-back comeback victories.
headlines.shortLinkText: Davis Mills leads Texans to 16-13 win over Titans on Wright's game-ending field goal

headlines.description: — The Chicago Bears have built this breakthrough season on the simplest and most effective way to win with a work-in-progress quarterback — a turnover margin that's become the envy of the league.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bears beat Vikings 19-17 with game-ending FG set up by Duvernay's 56-yard kickoff return

events.name: Green Bay Packers at New York Giants

headlines.description: — Trailing early and having lost their last two games, the Green Bay Packers could have been in real trouble when quarterback Jordan Love took a big hit to his left shoulder and jogged inside for further evaluation.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jordan Love throws 2 TD passes as Packers beat Giants 27-20 to end their skid

headlines.description: — Their future Hall of Fame quarterback spent the second half in the locker room dealing with an aching left wrist. The perennial All-Pro live wire at the back end of their defense joined him after being ejected.
headlines.shortLinkText: Steelers run past Bengals 34-12 but lose Aaron Rodgers to a left wrist injury

events.name: Los Angeles Chargers at Jacksonville Jaguars

headlines.description: — Trevor Lawrence received an unusual photo request in the locker room after one of the most enjoyable victories of his Jacksonville Jaguars tenure.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jaguars rebound from historic loss with a dominant 35-6 win against Chargers

events.name: Seattle Seahawks at Los Angeles Rams

headlines.description: — The Rams made four interceptions and they kept Seattle out of the end zone for the first 57 1/2 minutes. Los Angeles' offense scored three touchdowns against the Seahawks' vaunted defense.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rams have 4 interceptions, Seahawks miss long field goal on final play in Los Angeles' 21-19 win

headlines.description: — Brock Purdy had barely settled into his first game back from a toe injury when he checked the opposing defense, made a quick switch at the line of scrimmage and then hit tight end George Kittle <a...
headlines.shortLinkText: Brock Purdy throws 3 TDs in return from toe injury, 49ers cruise to 41-22 win over sloppy Cardinals

headlines.description: — The Baltimore Ravens ended up needing a play they call “Hurricane” to rally for their fourth straight win and spoil Shedeur Sanders’ NFL debut.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mark Andrews' late TD lifts Ravens to 23-16 win over Browns and spoils Shedeur Sanders' NFL debut

events.name: Kansas City Chiefs at Denver Broncos

headlines.description: — Wil Lutz lined up for a 35-yard field goal to beat the Chiefs on Sunday and couldn't help but think back to last year at Kansas City, when his kick was...
headlines.shortLinkText: Broncos beat Chiefs 22-19 on Lutz's last-second field goal, extending win streak to 8 games

headlines.description: — The Eagles are positioned again to make a strong run at another Super Bowl — not solely on the arm of Jalen Hurts, the legs of Saquon Barkley and other marquee offensive players all NFL fans know — but on a defense that has churned out a string of...
headlines.shortLinkText: Jalen Hurts' lone touchdown leads Eagles to 16-9 victory over Lions in lackluster offensive game
